intro.value: Life at IIT Patna beyond the classroom — festivals, clubs, sports, and a thriving residential community.

fests.name: Anwesha
fests.blurb: One of East India's biggest youth festivals since 2010, with 10,000+ footfall.

fests.name: Celesta
fests.blurb: A celebration of innovation and technical prowess.

areas.title: Sports & Recreation
areas.body: Sports complex, courts, gymnasiums — team and individual.

areas.title: Dining
areas.body: Mess halls, canteens and cafeterias with rotating menus.

areas.title: Residential Community
areas.body: 1500+ students across hostels with reading rooms, games and gyms.
